Play audio through several output devices at once — speakers, headphones, HDMI, Bluetooth — with per-device volume and mute.

## Highlights

- Enable any combination of outputs; a master volume appears when two or more are active
- Per-device volume and mute, kept in sync with external changes and device hotplug
- Silent mode: disable every device to mute the system
- Linux (PulseAudio / PipeWire) and Windows 10/11 (WASAPI), both verified on real hardware

## Downloads

- **Windows**: NSIS installer (unsigned — SmartScreen may warn on first run)
- **Linux**: `.deb`, `.rpm`, or AppImage

## Known limitation

On Windows, while several outputs are active, the primary device's volume and mute also scale the mirrored outputs (loopback capture taps the post-volume mix on most hardware).
